base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fds_lost_levels_world_map_a — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Famicom Disk System 'The Lost Levels' / SMB2-JP level map — harder variant using same tile atlas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Famicom Disk System 'The Lost Levels' / SMB2-JP level map — harder variant using same tile atlas; includes Poison Mushroom + wind-gust mechanics not in retail SMB.
